title: Yoink! - Texture ripper
description:
Texture RippingExtract textures from any surface, even if its curved. 

Yoink automatically corrects perspective distortion. 

Stylized TexturesTake full control of your art. Yoink lets you create stylized textures with custom color quantization.

Tiling previewSee exactly how your texture tiles before you export.

Seamless texturesYoink offers tools to speed up seamless texture creation.

Lens CorrectionYoink corrects lens distortion and chromatic aberration automatically when camera and lens metadata is present.

RAW Files SupportWork directly with RAW files (ARW, RW2, CR2, and more) alongside standard formats (JPG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF).
description_short: Make textures for your next project quickly with Yoink!, the best tool for ripping textures from images.
